summary: Frontend-only testing for new POI brand filters in TRUCKERS NAV. Verified all 8 new brand IDs (exxon, shell, bp, marathon, circle_k, seven_eleven, lowes, home_depot) are correctly implemented across MapControls, PoiIcon, NavigationView, and geminiService. All UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: In geminiService.ts, Lowe's and Home Depot POIs fetched via HERE API are assigned type='distribution' (line 334-335). This is OK because getPoiCategory() checks name first and correctly returns 'lowes'/'home_depot'. No action needed.

Minor: In PoiIcon.tsx getPoiIcon(), the distribution fallback check on line 379 has lowerName.includes('depot') which could theoretically catch Home Depot, but since the specific home_depot SVG check at line 337 comes earlier in the function, this is not an issue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App runs at http://localhost:8001. It is a Vite+React SPA served by Express. Navigation view is accessed by clicking 'Navigation' in the left sidebar. Filter panel opens via the funnel icon button (title='Filter POIs') on the right side controls panel (#nav-map-controls). All 8 new POI brand filters verified and working. No auth required.
